program_name: Середня освіта (Трудове навчання та технології, інформатика)

balance_remarks.quote_uk: ГЕР зазначає реалізацію рекомендацій 2-3 за критерієм 2: співвідношення кредитів ЄКТС за предметними спеціальностями Технології та Інформатика є орієнтовно однаковими й становлять 47/45 відповідно.
balance_remarks.gloss_en: The GER notes implementation of recommendations 2–3 under criterion 2: the ECTS credit ratio for the subject specialisations Technology and Computer Science is approximately equal, standing at 47/45 respectively.

decision_basis: possibleSolution=1 (accredit); accreditationDecision=5. No substantial deficiencies found by EG; GER confirmed near-symmetric credit split (47/45) as satisfactory.
key_finding: The GER explicitly confirmed that the two subject specialisations carry almost equal ECTS loads (47 vs 45 credits), treating near-symmetric distribution as a positive outcome. No pressure was exerted toward further equalisation, but the near-50/50 split was noted approvingly, illustrating how accreditation bodies can implicitly normalise symmetric design.
